calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Set For Trial On Sep-08-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Pamela May In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Gina R. Klump In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PAMELA MAY's Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default.

Defendant Pamela May's unopposed Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court orders the default entered against Defendant May on December 2, 2025, vacated and set aside. Defendant May's answer filed December 9, 2025, is deemed proper and shall be regarded as her answer to Plaintiff's complaint filed July 29, 2025.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
